name: Workbench Inspector
description: Inspects Component roots, named slots, assets, and authored DOM styles on any referenced workbench surface, with an optional high-contrast Hard Mode map.
useWhen: provide code handoff on a fullscreen Playground or Wireframe
distinguish Component, slot, and raw element boundaries
audit Design Lab's own application shell for Component reuse
avoidWhen: inspect content outside an explicitly referenced review surface
